# Petar Arsić Portfolio

> Full-stack Laravel, PHP, React and WordPress developer based in Belgrade, Serbia, building production booking, ticketing, tourism/accommodation and business web applications for real companies. 5+ years in production.

## About

Petar Arsić is a full-stack developer focused on booking systems, tourism and accommodation portals, admin panels/dashboards, CRM and internal business tools, WordPress/WooCommerce sites, and custom Laravel + React web applications. His flagship product, DriveSoft, powers online seat reservations, QR-code ticket validation, payment processing with fiscal-receipt integration, and role-based admin tools for international bus carriers.

Every page above also exists in Serbian at the same path under `/sr/` instead of `/en/` (e.g. `https://petararsic.rs/sr/services/ecommerce-woocommerce`).

## Key projects

- [DriveSoft](https://drivesoft.rs/) — Reservation, ticketing and operations platform for international bus carriers. 150,000+ tickets processed.
- [Srbija Tours](https://srbijatours.com/) — Public ticket-sales site sharing one source of truth with the booking backend.
- [Srbija Tours mobile app](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.panzo98.srbijatours) — Cross-platform React Native app for iOS and Android.
- [DriveSoft operations back-office](https://drivesoft-bozic.com/login) — Internal tool for managing passengers, routes, departures and daily operations.
- [Bozic Konig](https://bozic-konig.com/) — Online reservation front-end for a carrier.
- [Prostor Miljenko Dereta](https://prostordereta.org/) — Corporate site with blog and space-booking forms on custom WordPress.

## Contact

- [GitHub](https://github.com/petar2020)
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/petar-arsic-2067821b5/)
- Email: petar.arsic14@hotmail.com

## Tech stack

Laravel, PHP, MySQL, React, Next.js, React Native, Expo, Redis, Docker, DigitalOcean, WordPress, Nginx, Plausible Analytics

## Specialties

Booking & ticketing systems, tourism and accommodation portals, payment & fiscalization integration, QR-code ticket validation, role-based admin panels and CRM tools, WordPress/WooCommerce sites, transport operations software, full-stack SaaS development

## Availability

Open to full-time, contract and freelance work. Remote, async-first. Belgrade, Serbia (EU-friendly timezone, CET/CEST).
